name: Zapata National Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Zapata, TX serving personal and commercial customers since 1961 with checking, savings, loans, and mobile banking.
description_long:
Zapata National Bank is an independent, locally-owned banking institution headquartered in Zapata, Texas, with a history of community service dating back to 1961. The bank emphasizes its position as a home-owned operation capable of making loan decisions locally, differentiating itself from larger national institutions. As an FDIC-insured bank backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, it provides standard deposit protection up to regulatory limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking products including multiple checking account options (Free Checking, Regular Checking, NOW Checking, and Zapata NOW), savings accounts (Personal Savings, Super NOW, Money Market), and personal loans. For commercial customers, Zapata National Bank provides commercial checking, commercial savings, money market accounts, commercial loans, merchant services, and business lending solutions. All customers have access to mobile banking, 24/7 local ATMs, extended-hour drive-up services, and a dedicated customer service phone line.

Zapata National Bank distinguishes itself through local decision-making authority, claiming faster loan approval responses and personalized service compared to larger competitors. The bank markets itself as "The Friendly Bank" and emphasizes convenience through extended operating hours and distributed ATM access. As an independent institution, it positions the ability to serve both personal and business banking needs with community-focused attention.

The bank operates as a standard retail banking institution with no specialized focus on underserved populations, credit-challenged borrowers, or alternative financial services. While FDIC insurance provides deposit safety, the website contains limited detail about loan terms, rates, fees, or competitive advantages beyond local service claims. Potential customers should contact the bank directly at (956) 765-4302 or visit locations to obtain specific product pricing and terms.
services: Online banking with login and registration
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
Locally-owned and operated since 1961 with local loan decision-making authority
24/7 ATM access with extended-hour drive-up convenience
Multiple checking and savings account options across personal and commercial segments
Mobile banking and online banking services available
Merchant services available for business customers
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Zapata, TX area
Website lacks specific information about loan rates, APRs, and account fees
No online account opening or digital onboarding process described
Minimal transparency about competitive rates or account minimums
Limited mention of customer protections beyond standard FDIC insurance
best_for: Zapata, TX residents seeking community-focused personal banking with local service
Small businesses in the Zapata area needing commercial banking and merchant services
Customers prioritizing in-person relationships and local decision-making over national bank convenience
Local depositors wanting FDIC-insured accounts with extended ATM and drive-up access
diagnosis: Zapata National Bank is best suited for Zapata, TX residents and local businesses who value community banking relationships and local loan decisions. The primary caveat is that this is a geographically limited institution with minimal online presence and no apparent digital-first capabilities, making it inaccessible to customers outside the Zapata area or those preferring remote banking.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
